steps.title: Merge the integrated `development` commit onto `main`, push `main`, and create and push a release tag from that exact promoted commit
Run `bun run deploy-manager-runtime <release-tag>` to deploy the promoted release tag, or run `bun run deploy-manager-runtime` to deploy `origin/main` when no explicit release tag is being used
Verify the runtime checkout revision match and frontend-backend version match
Check `http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health` and confirm the dashboard and manager report healthy status
